status_quo: Attribution models credit 40% more conversions than actually occur because click-to-purchase joins double-count cross-device sessions. Media spend is misallocated toward channels that appear to convert but don't, while genuinely effective spend gets cut.
with_bayesiq: BayesIQ deduplicates cross-device sessions at the join layer, corrects the attribution overcounting, and shows where media spend is actually driving revenue — so every dollar moves toward channels with real, verified conversion lift.
headline_finding: Attribution credits 40% more conversions than actual — media spend systematically misallocated to phantom performance.
